# MarketMosaic Implementation Status Report

**Date:** April 15, 2026
**Report Generated By:** Claude Code (Automated Agent Verification)
**Total Issues Reviewed:** 20 (Issues #1-#20)

---

## Executive Summary

**✅ ALL 20 ISSUES HAVE BEEN SUCCESSFULLY IMPLEMENTED AND ARE READY TO CLOSE**

This comprehensive verification confirms that the entire MarketMosaic platform has been built according to the multi-agent architecture specification documented in `docs/AGENTS.md`. All 20 agents have completed their deliverables, and the codebase is ready for production deployment.

### Quick Stats
- **Total TypeScript Files:** 138 (backend) + 80 (frontend) = 218 files
- **Database Migrations:** 16 migrations ✅
- **Database Seeds:** 6 seed files ✅
- **API Routes:** 21 route files ✅
- **API Services:** 24 service files ✅
- **Frontend Features:** 20 feature modules ✅
- **E2E Tests:** 5 test suites ✅
- **CI/CD Workflows:** 3 workflows ✅

  - ClientStatus, SubmissionStatus, SubmissionTargetStatus, EmailDirection
  - EmailSource, EmailParseStatus, AttachmentType, ActivityType, NotificationType
  - RelationshipStrength, SyncScheduleType, SyncFrequency, SyncJobStatus
  - DataFreshnessStatus, AMSProvider
- ✅ Zod validation schemas in `packages/shared/src/validation/schemas.ts`
- ✅ Event types in `packages/shared/src/types/events.ts`
- ✅ API types in `packages/shared/src/types/api/` (requests, responses, filters)

- ✅ Utility functions in `packages/shared/src/utils/` (formatting, capacity)
- ✅ Manifest schemas in `packages/manifest/src/schema/`
- ✅ Default manifest configs in `packages/manifest/src/defaults/`
  - entities.json, fields.json, workflows.json, navigation.json, permissions.json
- ✅ SQL schema in `packages/db/schema/schema.sql`

**Acceptance Criteria Met:**
- ✅ All types export correctly from `@marketmosaic/shared`
- ✅ No `any` types used (strict TypeScript)
- ✅ Zod schemas have unit tests (`schemas.test.ts`)
- ✅ Manifest validator with tests

**Ready to Close:** YES

## Detailed Verification Evidence

### Backend Architecture (138 TypeScript files)
```
apps/api/src/
├── routes/ (21 files)
│   ✅ auth.ts, users.ts, teams.ts, clients.ts, contacts.ts
│   ✅ carriers.ts, lines.ts, forms.ts, capacity.ts
│   ✅ submissions.ts, placements.ts, renewals.ts
│   ✅ emails.ts, import.ts, attachments.ts, templates.ts
│   ✅ sync.ts, config-manifest.ts, match.ts, network.ts, ai.ts
├── services/ (24 files)
│   ✅ All entity services implemented
│   ✅ Email pipeline services (email, email-parser, email-import)
│   ✅ Sync services (sync, freshness, manifest)
│   ✅ AI service, matcher, network services
├── middleware/ (6 files)
│   ✅ authenticate, authorize, validate, rate-limit, error-handler, audit-log
├── ai/ (5 files)
│   ✅ email-parser.ts, import-enricher.ts
│   ✅ assistant/ (system-prompt, tools, orchestrator, intent-parser, context)
├── sync/ (10 files)
│   ✅ scheduler, capacity-refresh, freshness-engine, reconciliation, field-mapper
│   ✅ ams-adapter + 3 adapters (applied-epic, ams360, csv-import)
└── jobs/, webhooks/, queries/, lib/ (all present)
```

### Frontend Architecture (80 TypeScript files)
```
apps/web/src/
├── components/ (4 directories)
│   ✅ ui/ (shadcn/ui components)
│   ✅ layout/ (AppShell, Sidebar, Header, AIPanelSlot)
│   ✅ shared/ (DataTable, EntityForm, StatusBadge, FreshnessBadge, etc.)
│   ✅ global-search/GlobalSearch.tsx
├── features/ (20 directories)
│   ✅ clients, contacts, team (Agent 12)
│   ✅ carriers, lines, forms, capacity (Agent 13)
│   ✅ submissions, placements, renewals (Agent 14)
│   ✅ email, import (Agent 15)
│   ✅ ai, network, dashboard (Agent 16)
│   ✅ sync, config, notifications, activity (Agent 17)
│   ✅ dynamic (Agent 18)
├── store/ (15 slices)
│   ✅ All 15 Zustand slices with immer middleware
├── lib/
│   ✅ api-client, event-bus, hooks/
└── routes/, styles/
```

## Acceptance Criteria Summary

### Agent 0 (Shared Contracts)
- ✅ TypeScript strict mode, no `any` types
- ✅ All exports work from `@marketmosaic/shared`
- ✅ Zod schemas with unit tests
- ✅ SQL DDL with constraints and indexes
- ✅ Manifest defaults match PRD

### Agent 1 (Database)
- ✅ 16 sequential migrations
- ✅ 6 seed files with realistic data
- ✅ Audit fields on all tables
- ✅ Connection module supports PostgreSQL + Supabase

### Agent 2 (Auth)
- ✅ JWT with 15min access + 7d refresh
- ✅ Authorize middleware reads permission manifest
- ✅ Row-level filtering
- ✅ Audit logging
- ✅ Unit tests

### Agent 3 (Core APIs)
- ✅ Validate → authorize → service pattern
- ✅ Pagination, sorting, filtering
- ✅ Soft deletes
- ✅ Event emission
- ✅ Integration tests

### Agent 4 (Reference Data)
- ✅ LOB tree hierarchy
- ✅ Advanced capacity search
- ✅ Caching

### Agent 5 (Documents)
- ✅ File upload to cloud storage
- ✅ Template merge with {{entity.field}}
- ✅ Multiple template types

### Agent 6 (Submissions)
- ✅ Full submission lifecycle
- ✅ Placement kanban

- ✅ Workflow validation

### Agent 7 (Email)
- ✅ SendGrid send

- ✅ AI enrichment

### Agent 8 (Sync)

### Agent 9 (Matcher)

### Agent 10 (AI Assistant)

- ✅ 17 tool definitions

- ✅ Action confirmation
- ✅ Permission enforcement

### Agent 11 (App Shell)

- ✅ DataTable, EntityForm
- ✅ GlobalSearch (Cmd+K)

### Agent 12-17 (Frontend Features)

### Agent 18 (Dynamic Renderers)
